all.name: Aether-Rich Sap
all.description: Acquired by assisting in events throughout Castora. Used at vendors across Castora.

all.name: Airship Part
all.description: Earned and spent in Verdant Brink. Train the Itzel Language Mastery ability to trade with Itzel vendors for bladed armor and other goods.

all.name: Ancient Coin
all.description: Acquired by opening hidden chests in content released prior to the current expansion. Can be traded with Ancient Coin Collectors for rewards.

all.name: Antiquated Ducat
all.description: Acquired by assisting in events throughout Castora. Used at vendors across Castora.

all.name: Ascalonian Tear
all.description: Earned in Ascalonian Catacombs. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of Ascalon" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Ascended Shards of Glory
all.description: Earned from PvP League Division Chests.

all.name: Astral Acclaim
all.description: Earned by completing objectives in the Wizard's Vault. Spend to purchase rewards from the Astral Rewards section of the Wizard's Vault.

all.name: Badge of Honor
all.description: Earned and spent in WvW to purchase various items.

all.name: Bandit Crest
all.description:
Earned by completing events in the Silverwastes. Accepted by vendors in Camp Resolve and at secured outposts.
Can be traded for valuable items including Carapace armor and recipes for sinister gear.

all.name: Bandit Skeleton Key
all.description: Used to open lost bandit chests in the Silverwastes. Chests can contain armor, weapons, recipes, ambrite, and more.

all.name: Blue Prophet Crystal
all.description:
Crystalline formations of dragon magic, veined with blue.
Used to open the weekly strike rewards chest in the Eye of the North.
Obtained by purchasing from vendors for magnetite shards.

all.name: Blue Prophet Shard
all.description:
Crystalline shards of dragon magic, veined with blue.
Can be exchanged for rewards in the Eye of the North, Arborstone, or Lion's Arch.

all.name: Cache Key
all.description: Used to loot cache chests around Drizzlewood Coast.

all.name: Calcified Gasp
all.description: Earned in Inner Nayos.

all.name: Canach Coins
all.description: Acquired by playing the Coin Rush in Club Canach. May be used to obtain rewards in Club Canach.

all.name: Coin
all.description: The primary currency of Tyria. Spent at vendors throughout the world.

all.name: Deadly Bloom
all.description: Earned in Twilight Arbor. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of Thorns" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Elegy Mosaic
all.description:
Earned by completing legendary bounties in the Crystal Desert. Spend at the Tomb of Primeval Kings.

<c=@Flavor>These markers were used to commemorate great deeds in the Dynastic Era of ancient Elona.</c>

all.name: Exalted Key
all.description: Used to open Exalted chests in Auric Basin. Chests can contain armor, weapons, and recipes.

all.name: Festival Token
all.description: Earned by participating in the yearly Festival of the Four Winds.

all.name: Fine Rift Essence
all.description: Found in rift hunts and Convergences.

all.name: Flame Legion Charr Carving
all.description: Earned in Citadel of Flame. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of Baelfire" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Fractal Relic
all.description: Earned and spent in Fractals of the Mists. Also used as a crafting ingredient.

all.name: Gaeting Crystal
all.description: Earned from bosses and events inside Path of Fire raids.

all.name: Gaeting Crystal
all.description: Earned from bosses and events inside Janthir Wilds raids. Used at specific raid vendors in the Janthir region.

all.name: Gem
all.description: Purchased and spent via the Black Lion Trading Company.

all.name: Geode
all.description:
Earned by completing events in Dry Top. Accepted by vendors throughout the area.
Can be traded for valuable items including recipes for foods, Nomad's gear, and ambrite weapons.

all.name: Green Prophet Crystal
all.description:
Crystalline formations of dragon magic, veined with green.
Emissaries in the Eye of the North have interest in these.
Obtained from Priority Strikes or by combining shards.

all.name: Green Prophet Shard
all.description:
Crystalline shards of dragon magic, veined with green.
Can be exchanged for rewards in the Wizard's Tower, the Eye of the North, Arborstone, or Lion's Arch.

all.name: Guild Commendation
all.description: Earned through Guild Missions. Spent in Lion's Arch. Used to purchase various rewards.

all.name: Imperial Favor
all.description: Acquired by assisting in events throughout Cantha. Used at vendors in Cantha.

all.name: Jade Miner's Keycard
all.description: Used to open mining caches around Gyala Delve.

all.name: Jade Sliver
all.description: Acquired from junk items recycled by the Jade Bot Recycler.

all.name: Karma
all.description: Earned through various activities. Spent at vendors throughout the world.

all.name: Knowledge Crystal
all.description: Earned in Crucible of Eternity. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of Knowledge" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Laurel
all.description: Obtained from Wizard's Vault rewards. Used to purchase various rewards from laurel merchants.

all.name: Legendary Insight
all.description: Earned from bosses and events inside raids and challenge mode Strike Missions.

all.name: Ley Line Crystal
all.description: Earned and spent in Tangled Depths. Train the Nuhoch Language Mastery ability to trade with Nuhoch vendors for chak weapons and other goods.

all.name: Lump of Aurillium
all.description: Earned and spent in Auric Basin. Train the Exalted Acceptance Mastery line to trade with Exalted merchants for auric weapon recipes and other goods.

all.name: Machete
all.description: Used to open noxious pods in Dragon's Stand. Pods can contain armor, weapons, and recipes.

all.name: Magnetite Shard
all.description: Earned from bosses and events inside Heart of Thorns and Path of Fire raids.

all.name: Manifesto of the Moletariate
all.description: Earned in Sorrow's Embrace. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of the Forgeman" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Masterwork Rift Essence
all.description: Found in tier 2 rift hunts and Convergences.

all.name: Mistborn Key
all.description: Used to open Mistborn Coffers in Dragonfall.

all.name: Pact Crowbar
all.description: Used to open airship cargo in Verdant Brink. Cargo can contain crafting materials, armor, weapons, and recipes.

all.name: Pinch of Stardust
all.description: Earned in Amnytas

all.name: Pristine Fractal Relic
all.description: Earned and spent in the Fractals of the Mists. Used to purchase ascended rings.

all.name: Proof of Heroics
all.description: Earned when ranking up in World vs World. Spent at any Notary of Heroics in World vs. World to obtain hero points.

all.name: Provisioner Token
all.description: Earned by helping Faction Provisioners.

all.name: PvP League Ticket
all.description: Earned when crossing division thresholds during PvP league seasons. Spend in the Heart of the Mists and trade for various rewards at the PvP League Vendor.

all.name: PvP Tournament Voucher
all.description: Earned in monthly automated tournaments and some special event tournaments.

all.name: Racing Medallion
all.description: Earned by participating in roller beetle races and time trials.

all.name: Rare Rift Essence
all.description: Found in tier 3 rift hunts and Convergences.

all.name: Red Prophet Crystal
all.description:
Crystalline formations of dragon magic, veined with red.
Emissaries in the Eye of the North have interest in these.
Obtained from Priority Strikes or by combining shards.

all.name: Red Prophet Shard
all.description:
Crystalline shards of dragon magic, veined with red.
Emissaries in the Eye of the North have interest in these.

all.name: Research Note
all.description: Acquired by deconstructing crafted items with research kits. Used at vendors in Cantha, the Horn of Maguuma, and Janthir, and to craft newer recipes.

all.name: Seal of Beetletun
all.description: Earned in Caudecus's Manor. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of the Nobleman" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Shard of Zhaitan
all.description: Earned in the Ruined City of Arah. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of Zhaitan" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Spirit Shard
all.description: Used by Miyani to maintain the Mystic Forge.

all.name: Static Charge
all.description: Earned in Skywatch Archipelago

all.name: Symbol of Koda
all.description: Earned in Honor of the Waves. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the "Gift of the Sanctuary" component used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Tales of Dungeon Delving
all.description: Earned in dungeons. Spent in Lion's Arch to purchase rare and exotic gear, runes and sigils, crafting materials, and the legendary crafting components used in creating legendary weapons.

all.name: Testimony of Castoran Heroics
all.description: Earned when ranking up in World vs World. Spent at any Notary of Heroics in World vs. World to obtain hero points.

all.name: Testimony of Desert Heroics
all.description: Earned when ranking up in World vs World. Spent at any Notary of Heroics in World vs. World to obtain hero points.

all.name: Testimony of Jade Heroics
all.description: Earned when ranking up in World vs World. Spent at any Notary of Heroics in World vs. World to obtain hero points.

all.name: Trade Contract
all.description: Earned in the Crystal Desert. Spend at karma merchants to purchase trade crates with crafting materials, new crafting recipes, and other rewards unique to the Crystal Desert.

all.name: Trader's Key
all.description: Used to open trade crates in the Crystal Desert.

all.name: Transmutation Charge
all.description: Purchased via the Black Lion Trading Company. Spent in the wardrobe to change appearance.

all.name: Tyrian Defense Seal
all.description: Earned by protecting Tyria in Dragon Response Missions. Spent at faction vendors in Eye of the North.

all.name: Unbound Magic
all.description: Earned from creatures empowered by unbound magic.

all.name: Unstable Fractal Essence
all.description: Earned and spent in Fractals of the Mists. Used to purchase prestigious rewards.

all.name: Unusual Coin
all.description: Acquired by opening hidden chests in the most recent expansion's content. Can be traded with Unusual Coin Collectors for rewards.

all.name: Ursus Oblige
all.description: Acquired by assisting in events throughout Janthir. Used at vendors across Janthir Wilds.

all.name: Vial of Chak Acid
all.description: Used to open crystallized supply caches in Tangled Depths. Caches can contain armor, weapons, and recipes.

all.name: Volatile Magic
all.description: Unstable magic lingering from the fall of a god and two Elder Dragons. Spent at vendors to purchase unlocks and rewards.

all.name: War Supplies
all.description: Materials to aid in the ongoing conflict in the Drizzlewood Coast. Can be traded for war equipment and items or used to upgrade bases.

all.name: WvW Skirmish Claim Ticket
all.description: Earned by participating in WvW skirmishes. Traded for various rewards at a WvW Skirmish Supervisor.

all.name: Zephyrite Lockpick
all.description: Used to open buried locked chests in Dry Top. These chests are only visible during sandstorms. Chests can contain armor, weapons, rare skins, recipes, ambrite, and more.
